description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named AMR-Wind-Docs that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a single ubuntu-latest job that cancels previous runs, checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.x, installs dependencies including doxygen, graphviz, sphinx, and sphinx_rtd_theme, builds documentation with sphinx-build and doxygen, reports warnings, and deploys to gh-pages if the event is a push.
